title: Back On Death
description: Return to your last death with /back
body:
BackOnDeath — lightweight `/back` plugin for Spigot/Paper **1.13+**.

**Compatibility**
- Spigot / Paper **1.13 – 1.21.x**
- Built with Java 8 bytecode (runs on modern JREs)

## Features
- Return to your **last death** with `/back` (point is consumed **only on successful** teleport).
- **Safe spot detection** near the death location.
- **TTL** for the death point (configurable).
- **Combat lock** (deny `/back` for N seconds after taking/dealing damage).
- **Cooldown** and **warmup** with cancel on move/damage.
- **Clickable hint** after respawn.
- **Multi-language** via `plugins/BackOnDeath/lang/<code>.yml` (auto-detect client locale).

## Commands & Permissions
- `/back` — return to your last death  
  Permissions:
  - `back.use` (true by default)
  - `back.bypass.cooldown` (op)
  - `back.bypass.warmup` (op)
  - `back.admin` — `/back reload` (op)
